name: Jotform | Forms, surveys, agent, chatbot, e-sign, and workflow automation
title: Jotform - Powerful forms get it done.
description: Power your Salesforce data collection and lead capture with our no-code form builder, featuring dynamic prefill, e-signatures, custom PDF documents, and more — enhanced with AI agents that automatically create, update, and track records in real time.
fullDescription:
Save time and eliminate busywork with Jotform. Create dynamic forms right from your Salesforce dashboard with Jotform’s intuitive Form Builder. Collect lead information and automatically sync it to Salesforce — no manual entry needed. Instantly share personalized forms prefilled with real-time Salesforce data. 

Automatically send files, e-signatures, and PDFs from Jotform to Salesforce records for easy management in one place. Detailed transfer logs, error alerts, and diagnostic tools ensure smooth, reliable data flow.

Designed for teams using Salesforce as their main CRM, the Jotform Salesforce Agent boosts efficiency through intelligent automation. It connects directly to Service, Experience, and Health Clouds, enabling real-time record creation, updates, and lookups during chat, web, or phone interactions. With predefined skills for lead management, case handling, order tracking, appointment scheduling, and HR support, it helps teams deliver 24/7 assistance and maintain accurate Salesforce data — no manual effort required.

With 30+ million users worldwide, Jotform is a trusted global brand that serves all types of industries and organizations.

publisher.name: Jotform Inc.
publisher.description:
Jotform helps eliminate busywork with powerful online forms that streamline data collection, process payments, and automate workflows. With over 18 years of experience and 30 million users worldwide, Jotform empowers organizations to manage their operations with a complete lineup of no-code solutions.

Build and share custom forms in minutes using the intuitive Form Builder. Manage responses with Jotform Tables and Inbox, collaborate in real time with Jotform Teams, and automate follow-up actions through Jotform Workflows.

Collect e-signatures online with Jotform Sign, transform form data into professional documents with the PDF Editor, and create polished reports instantly using the Report Builder.

Extend these capabilities with an AI-powered Salesforce Agent that automates CRM workflows by creating, updating, and tracking Salesforce records in real time.

Trusted globally, Jotform was ranked No. 1 in G2’s 2025 Fall Report for Online Form Builders.

highlights:
Build Forms in No Time
No coding knowledge required. Simply drag and drop to create your form from scratch or choose from 10,000+ ready-made templates.

Connect Seamlessly with Salesforce
Dynamically pre-populate forms with the latest Salesforce data. Your forms automatically sync with Salesforce, keeping your account up to date every time you receive a new submission.

Keep Your Data Secure 
Data security is a top priority at Jotform. Your data is protected with a 256-bit SSL connection, PCI certification, CCPA compliance, and GDPR compliance — as well as optional HIPAA features and form encryption.

Streamline Document Management
Send e-signed documents, uploaded files, and submission PDFs from Jotform directly to Salesforce. Automatically attach files to relevant Salesforce records and manage everything from one centralized location.

Omnichannel AI Conversations
Manage conversations across chat, web, and phone with consistent, human-like responses. The agent detects and triggers the right Salesforce actions in real time, with detailed integration logs visible in each conversation.

Lead, Appointment & Ticket Management
The Jotform Salesforce Agent uses predefined skills to capture and update leads and opportunities, schedule appointments, and create or resolve support tickets — all in real time on standard or custom Salesforce.

model.user_limitations:
Free users can enjoy up to 5 forms and 100 monthly submissions.
Users with needs exceeding limitations on the free starter plan are encouraged to opt for a paid plan.
model.additional_details:
For even greater needs or company-wide access, Jotform offers Enterprise solutions. 

https://www.jotform.com/pricing/ for more details.
